tasks.title: System-agent seed + is_system column (migration 0010)
tasks.goal: Seed a hidden system-agent employee per company. is_system flag, indexed, filtered out of employees.list / org-chart / hire dialog / delegation pickers. Every downstream task depends on this.

tasks.title: Agentic loop core — @team-x/intelligence/src/loop/
tasks.goal: Pure ReAct loop. Tool registry, budget enforcement (step/token/timeout), streaming onStep, strict JSON tool-call parsing with one-shot nudge recovery. No Electron / DB / fs coupling.

tasks.title: Read-side agentic tools — query_{employees,tickets,projects,meetings,vault,events}
tasks.goal: Six read-only tools wrapping existing repos with JSON-safe projections. Max 50 rows per call with truncation marker. Read-only enforced — no write repo method inside any tool.

tasks.title: AgenticLoopService — main-process front-door
tasks.goal: start/stop/getRun. Resolves system-agent, creates per-query thread, instantiates loop, subscribes onStep to event bus, emits agentic.completed/failed, respects orchestrator pause, writes runs row.

tasks.title: Wire CommandService → AgenticLoopService
tasks.goal: Replace the M30 T4 stub at command-service.ts:770-775. Extend CommandHandlers interface with agenticLoopStart. ExecuteResult gains {runId, threadId}. IntentName drift guard stays green.

tasks.title: System-agent thread UX (renderer)
tasks.goal: System-agent threads render in their own Copilot Conversations section with robot icon. Thread detail shows step transcript inline with final answer. Read-only (no compose box).

tasks.title: Palette streaming integration — step log + stop
tasks.goal: Palette switches to step-log mode when ExecuteResult.runId present. Live step cards, stop button (wires command.stop IPC), cumulative cost footer, terminal Open-Thread button. All six UI states implemented.

tasks.title: Settings — agentic loop controls
tasks.goal: Three settings keys (agentic_max_steps=8, agentic_max_tokens=8000, agentic_timeout_ms=120000) with clamps. New Agentic Loop subsection in Settings → Runtime.

tasks.title: E2E spec — agentic-loop.spec.ts
tasks.goal: Full round-trip: Ctrl+K → complex_request → scripted plan → tool_call → tool_result → answer → thread persisted → audit rows visible. NODE_ENV=test seam gates real LLM/tools.

tasks.title: Documentation
tasks.goal: CLAUDE status + IPC + events + settings + troubleshooting. CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry. README feature. New agentic-loop user guide. Resequence §9 of Phase 5 design doc to reflect actual shipped order.

tasks.title: Verification + milestone marker
tasks.goal: Repo-root typecheck clean. Biome 0 errors / ≤76 warnings. ~905 unit tests. ABI rebuild dance + 8/8 E2E specs green. Orchestrator → M32, queue cleared, CONTINUITY rewritten.

notes: Scope is READ-ONLY. Write-side Task Planner tools (decompose_project, delegate_subtask, review_deliverable) are deferred to M32. Any PR attempting to add a write-side tool in M31 must be rejected.
Every task after T0 assumes system-agent is resolvable per company. Do not parallelize T0 with anything.
Subagent budget for E2E (T8) is ~2 passes based on M30 pattern. Coordinator runs final verify + commit.
ABI rebuild dance is mandatory before T10 (both Node and Electron ABIs).
